nasb.text: Now there were Jews living in Jerusalem, devout men from every nation under heaven.

esv.text: Now there were dwelling in Jerusalem Jews, devout men from every nation under heaven.

cnv.text: 那時住在耶路撒冷的，有從天下各國來的虔誠的猶太人。

ccb.text: 当时耶路撒冷住着从各国回来的虔诚的犹太人。

csbs.text: 当时，有从天下各国来的虔诚的犹太人，住在耶路撒冷。
